title: aster pilosus var. priceae
intro: Aster pilosus var. priceae, also known as Price's Purple Coneflower, is a rare and unique variety of the Aster pilosus plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aster pilosus var. priceae include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers or roots in hot water or a solvent, such as ethanol or glycerin.
